title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Mall

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Oberoi Mall
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Real Estate Agent for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
